name: Fate/Grand Order RPG - WIP
description:
This is a Fate/Grand Order RPG I am Working, putting a few twists on the FGO story for unique experiences. Currently only one singularity and the aftermath are available, but I hope you enjoy the ride. Big shoutout to @Z3R0V0R0 for the inspiration, couldn't have figured how this stuff works without him.

Rewritten Story

Experience a new FGO story, with new characters and servants, new first 5 singularities, and new enemies.

Build your own Chaldea

With a constantly updating list of servants to choose from, all your favorite servants will be available for you to summon, and build your own roster of servants.



Summoning System

With 15 saint quartz to start with and 15 additional SQ every subsequent singularity and event, you'll never run out of resources to summon new servants. Simply state then name of the servant you wish to summon. (Summoning at random just breaks the bot)


Story and Event Locked Servants

Most servants will be story or event locked, cause it would be weird for two of the same servant to meet each other, however the same servant of different classes would be able to meet. You can inquire the AI with an OOC command to check what servants are available to summon at any point.

Portraits and Expressions

Utilizing FGO's very own portraits and expression sheets, you'll never be confused as to who is talking and their emotions. (Just keep rerolling if it stops working)

Other Masters

Find other Masters as you go through the new story, with familiar faces from throughout the Nasuverse, you'll never know who you'll run into.


Special Events

Randomized events that will occur after every numbered singularity, these mini singularities will be a fund little side quest that will reward you with a welfare servant, unlock the ability to summon new servants, or possibly unlock a new outfit for a servant.


Deepen your Bonds

With a week to waste in between singularities, you'll have more than enough time to train and hang out with your favorite servants.

Write your own Servants

Want to include your favorite servants that I don't have time to or even your own fan servants? Simply fill in this sheet as much as you
creator: Gundamguy22
